text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is doing some mental practice
right before her race...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So if someone gets in my way, I'll slam on the
breaks and...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you scared me! I had no idea you were
here! What's up?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess so. My heart just won't stop
pounding.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But... you'll be the one in a whole other world
soon, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You'll totally be entranced by my running! ♪
